Forbes P.M.

Автор: Forbes


Автор: Forbes

Good evening, A good seed investor tracks down the best founders. But a great seed investor—including some of the top investors on this year’s Midas Seed List—has founders coming to them. These investors take big swings and enjoy big payoffs. Here’s who made the list. Only a handful of VCs have appeared 15 times or more on the list over the last 25 years. These are the Midas All-Stars. Thanks for reading! Kris Kornbluth Assistant Editor, Platforms & Curation More Recommended Reads Getty Images Could Musk Merge SpaceX And Tesla? Here’s What Analysts—And Betting Markets—Say Musk’s goal of controlling more of the AI market could make a SpaceX-Tesla merger his “holy grail,” one analyst said. Anadolu via Getty Images New York And New Jersey Announce FIFA Ticket Pricing Scheme Probe The attorneys general are reportedly looking at a “range of issues” related to ticketing.

73696.subject: How Can You Save Millions of Claude Tokens?
73696.body:
The Atlas

Автор: GenAI Works


Автор: GenAI Works

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/how-can-you-save-millions-claude-tokens-genai-works-mbboe?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BlOUrt0JiQP6l4BraUvgRkQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=0HfWVB7Fg2Gcg1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mpok90l6~js-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mpok90l6-js
  
Welcome back! This week is about one clear shift: AI teams are becoming more efficient, more structured, and more agentic. Claude’s prompt caching shows how developers can save hundreds of millions of tokens. Code with Claude London shows why AI learning needs a clear path, not just a playlist. Anthropic’s team shares practical prompting lessons from real debugging. And Google’s agent skills repo shows how agents can get the right knowledge at the right time. In today's Atlas Newsletter: Prompt caching in Claude: how one feature saved 300 million tokens in a week without changing a single setting? Code with Claude London: the 24-video playlist mapped into a learning path from model basics to enterprise scale. Anthropic's prompting playbook: six lessons from a live debugging session that beats most paid courses. Google's agent skills repo: why the next wave of AI performance may come from context architecture rather than bigger models? PS: Want to share your AI tool or company news with our 14M+ community? Get in touch. How to save millions of Claude Tokens in 10 minutes? Claude has a feature that can save developers millions of tokens a week. One creator reportedly saved 91 million tokens in a single day and more than 300 million in a week without changing a single setting. That is prompt caching working as intended. The idea is simple: Claude does not need to reprocess the same context every time. Cached tokens cost around 10% of normal input tokens. So if Claude reads 91 million cached tokens, the effective cost is closer to 9 million. That is the difference between burning context repeatedly and reusing it intelligently. Claude’s cache is organized in layers: System layer: base instructions, tools, and output style. Project layer: CLAUDE.md, memory, and project rules. Conversation layer: messages and replies rebuilt each turn. The problem is that many users accidentally break the cache. → Switch models mid-session? Cache resets. → Let a session sit idle for more than an hour? Cache goes cold. → Use sub-agents heavily? Their cache window is much shorter. → Run /compact or /clear? You reset the cache. This matters because high cache hit rates reduce cost, improve speed, and make session limits feel much more generous. Want the three habits that help most users save tokens and keep Claude sessions efficient? Subscribe here. Don’t miss it From data sto

73694.subject: New Claude Plugin, Mention in chats, and Editor Updates
73694.body:
Hey, it's Zeno.

We just dropped our official Claude Code Plugin https://resend.com/changelog/resend-claude-code-plugin to better support agentic development, improved our email editor experience, and have launched our design newsletter https://resend.com/savour.

Before we start, a quick question:

> What friction are you facing when using Resend?

We read every answer. Just hit reply.





OFFICIAL CLAUDE CODE PLUGIN

https://resend.com/changelog/resend-claude-code-plugin

Our official Claude Code plugin includes skills for creating React Emails, sending and receiving with Resend, agent inbox setup, and more. The plugin also includes the Resend MCP server built-in.

→ Read the changelog https://resend.com/changelog/resend-claude-code-plugin





@MENTION YOUR EMAILS

https://resend.com/changelog/mentions-in-ai-chats

When building automations, broadcasts, or templates, reference other templates in AI chats to reference your existing content, design, or layouts.

→ Check the changelog https://resend.com/changelog/mentions-in-ai-chats





VISUALIZE YOUR DATA

https://resend.com/changelog/chart-component

Data is easier to understand when it's visual. That's why we've added a new Chart component to the email editor, available in both Broadcasts https://resend.com/features/broadcasts and Templates https://resend.com/features/templates.

You can now embed bar, line, and area charts directly in your emails.

→ Read the changelog https://resend.com/changelog/chart-component





THE POWER OF TEMPLATES

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bULq0GWXU0o

If your API calls are still sending raw HTML or React Email inline, you're missing out. Resend templates give you a visual editor, version history, variables, and zero-deploy updates, all without touching your codebase. Here's everything you need to know.

→ Watch the video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bULq0GWXU0o





WHY THE TAILWIND TEAM CHOSE RESEND

https://resend.com/customers/tailwind

What started as a CSS framework has grown into a small family of products. In Tailwind's words, "Resend is the modern email service built for developers who value speed, support, and DX."

→ Read their story https://resend.com/customers/tailwind





READY FOR AUTH0

https://resend.com/changelog/auth0-integration

Crucial emails, like verification codes, password resets, and more, need to be delivered to inboxes quickly and reliably. With the Resend connector, you can start sending these emails in just a few minutes.

→ Check the changelog https://resend.com/changelog/auth0-integration





RESEND'S DESIGN TEAM NEWSLETTER IS HERE

https://resend.com/savour

A newsletter by the design team at Resend on taste, craft, and the details that make great products. Subscribe to receive each edition in your email inbox.

→ Subscribe to Savour https://resend.com/savour




Happy sending,
Zeno Rocha

----------------------------

73691.subject: OpenAI & SpaceX Are Turning Heads on Wall Street
73691.body:
Daily Pre-IPO Briefing

StartEngine Private (https://dxszHp04.na2.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DR+113/dxszHp04/VV_bNz6-NsvnW2LsmH21lSqjlW2C4PM95PzVdQN8XrLFz3lcq-W6N1vHY6lZ3pNW2zCJLc8_LsgCW35Xnbq2L-dP0W3skBPg48wYy2W5kHpZH7NmQvkVtxdQN4Ydm0PW5yWX2P1X2Z3yW1vLljd4Hdnz9W8fD_dP6M7XztW4fcCtk8MN9W9W69fwtq7Jvkr3W3KBnD65tpjZSW1JWhLx1FmYQ5W11wjYH98X0GhW49hy-R4tK2L7W7f2CPT2qcrJ8N4b5tKGqwcPGW3z0m415-cbJbN145Y_VVN0KBW6qjVHs2KFD_8W9hDccH2WMGN-W1T7kH-10mzcpW6Ftysm899PJHf6pG7jd04 )

Daily Pre-IPO Briefing (https://dxszHp04.na2.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DR+113/dxszHp04/VV_bNz6-NsvnW2LsmH21lSqjlW2C4PM95PzVdQN8XrLFz3lcq-W6N1vHY6lZ3pNW2zCJLc8_LsgCW35Xnbq2L-dP0W3skBPg48wYy2W5kHpZH7NmQvkVtxdQN4Ydm0PW5yWX2P1X2Z3yW1vLljd4Hdnz9W8fD_dP6M7XztW4fcCtk8MN9W9W69fwtq7Jvkr3W3KBnD65tpjZSW1JWhLx1FmYQ5W11wjYH98X0GhW49hy-R4tK2L7W7f2CPT2qcrJ8N4b5tKGqwcPGW3z0m415-cbJbN145Y_VVN0KBW6qjVHs2KFD_8W9hDccH2WMGN-W1T7kH-10mzcpW6Ftysm899PJHf6pG7jd04 )

Hi Oleg,

Welcome back to our Daily Pre-IPO Briefing, your quick recap of major headlines involving companies our investors already have exposure to via StartEngine Private.

Today’s theme? Wall Street is preparing for two potential “blockbuster” IPOs:

- OpenAI is expected to file for an IPO “very soon.” In the meantime, major U.S. index and mutual funds are setting aside cash and preparing to offload existing holdings as they anticipate adding a potential “blockbuster IPO” to their portfolios.¹
- SpaceX has fueled investor enthusiasm for the broader space tech industry with its IPO filing last week. Space and satellite-related stocks “soared” yesterday, including notable jumps for Redwire Corp. (+31%), AST SpaceMobile Inc. (+20%), and Firefly Aerospace Inc. (+21%).²
- Kraken launched Bitcoin Vaults, allowing users to earn up to 2.5% APY from their Bitcoin holdings. Risk and strategy are managed by institutional DeFi firm Sentora, which builds and executes lending and borrowing strategies to earn yield directly on-chain.³

A confidential filing does not guarantee that an IPO will occur. These reports don't imply specific results for investors with exposure to these companies on StartEngine Private. Past performance is not indicative of future results. There's no guarantee that revenue, funding, or valuation will continue to grow, or that OpenAI will be profitable. See risks on the offering page.

Whether it’s AI, crypto infrastructure, or space tech, institutional capital seems increasingly focused on the companies shaping what could come next.

Connect with our team to discuss the latest trends, or explore open current pre-IPO offerings

Explore Pre-IPO Opportunities
(https://dxszHp04.na2.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DR+113/dxszHp04/VV_bNz6-NsvnW2LsmH21lSqjlW2C4PM95PzVdQN8XrLFz3lcq-W6N1vHY6lZ3pNW2zCJLc8_LsgCW35Xnbq2L-dP0W3skBPg48wYy2W5kHpZH7NmQvkVtxdQN4Ydm0PW5yWX2P1X2Z3yW1vLljd4Hdnz9W8fD_dP6M7XztW4fcCtk8MN9W9W69fwtq7Jvkr3W3KBnD65tpjZSW1JWhLx1FmYQ5W11wjYH98X0GhW49hy-R4tK2L7W7f2CPT2qcrJ8N4b5tKGqwcPGW3z0m415-cbJbN145Y_VVN0KBW6qjVHs2KFD_8W9hDccH2WM

73689.subject: What a Week for OpenAI & StartEngine Private
73689.body:
For a new lower minimum, you can gain exposure with our Signal Fund

StartEngine Private (https://dxszHp04.na2.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DR+113/dxszHp04/MXjG3X3hGm6W4DRCLj1bs_BVW9fbdmV5PzPg2N2SX24q3pyd0W7Y8-PT6lZ3mvW7ddnWS5RdlQwW2WD4R019r4R8Vly5bl8sn99sN36VvVsHLBF0W1ZC2WH8Jy5p2W89mTL77wQM5FW42c3Gz5rhm6wN45zFLqjTqkhW7vqZ1j4zFRW5W1dZcr48TX7FkW4kg3Jk3rqBnwW4l44jG3N-f1bW7f8LWr7d00RJW8XvBRG4q4lb4W2hyL1W8fd3mgW7wNghY6mVvnjW2P078C29847TW59nHCG22MBLZW736D6_5Wq2CCW3B8vzb6PdXDYW3v8Nnf84X_99N1jlDjzNg7RTW6cBBrD7zBcKXW2_fZwc8YTH4PW7dP79K1V--hgW7HSBzJ8kfjNCf2X2CGz04 )

Signal Fund (https://dxszHp04.na2.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DR+113/dxszHp04/MXjG3X3hGm6W4DRCLj1bs_BVW9fbdmV5PzPg2N2SX24K3pyd0W8wLKSR6lZ3nDW6B_qv97kXQVWVmkWqP2klW_mW3f9hKn1BCblFW7w9V0Y569YgDW3NZ8mg3RxwSyW8Q3sD03NsndCW2DRC6n7ZmHr9TqQBn45JDQrW8g1ykV5wynMQW55yYx52QMCkjW53Kgg21csWz_W4jQfHr4PgyxJW9fl9Sb3lrN0GW6tW1_M6zMM_rW4Q2F_b77Z-PGW3GfDjJ3RpWFPVpl_r41gt6_SN2-myCKXX9l5N5xR4QpbjRvWW7V-CTy64D3TrW1rk1DM4lsjhqW6RxTr34gzVhXW3hgLz77DQTR3W8-7NqB3qthjPW4b5pbY6-BK4nW3L7FQX9m1JfqW26r0-z5W9DbhN9gPzLcV9-KKf5M1pc204 )

Hi Oleg,

We just had a pretty amazing week for StartEngine Private.

In fact, it was our third-highest week for investor commitments since launching in Q3 2023.

And one company in particular kept making news: OpenAI.

One of the most coveted companies on our platform delivered a trifecta of major headlines:

- Defeated Elon Musk in a major courtroom victory.¹
- Preparing to file for an IPO in the coming weeks.²
- Beat Anthropic’s Q1 revenue by about $1 billion.³

This paints a pretty clear picture: OpenAI is scaling aggressively for the next phase of AI growth.
